identity.name: Origin Fleet Manager
identity.description: A premium, high-fidelity fleet management dashboard inspired by Star Citizen's Origin Jumpworks. Combines the elegance of a luxury yacht with the precision of a spacecraft.
identity.theme_strategy: Executive Dark: Deep obsidian backgrounds with high-gloss white panels and ice-blue holographic accents.

motion.hover: transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-cyan-500/10

components.name: ShipCard
components.description: A premium card displaying a ship. Uses a 'glass' effect with a holographic border.
components.styling: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-cyan-500/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group relative

components.name: HoloStatBar
components.description: A progress bar that looks like a laser beam.

components.name: ComponentHexGrid
components.description: A hexagonal grid layout for displaying ship components (Shields, Coolers, Power).

components.name: OriginButton
components.description: A pill-shaped button with a sleek hover fill effect.
components.styling: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-rajdhani font-bold tracking-widest uppercase border border-cyan-500/30 hover:bg-cyan-500 hover:text-black transition-colors

components.name: FleetDashboard
components.description: The main dashboard view. Bento grid layout.

backgrounds.usage: Hero Section Background (Overlay with dark gradient)

visual_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Chevron, User, Settings) and 'react-icons/si' (Simple Icons) for brands if needed. Use thin strokes.
visual_assets.3d_strategy: Use high-quality 2D images with 'Parallax Tilt' effect (react-parallax-tilt) instead of full 3D to maintain performance while keeping the premium feel.

universal: No gradients on text unless it's a very subtle shine.
All borders must be 1px and very subtle (opacity 0.1 to 0.3).
Text hierarchy: Headings = Rajdhani (Uppercase), Body = Inter.
accessibility: Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1 on dark backgrounds.
Interactive elements must have a focus ring (cyan color).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Add the 'Rajdhani' font from Google Fonts via import in index.css.
3. Create the 'OriginButton' and 'GlassCard' primitive components first.
4. Build the Layout using a Sidebar (Left) and Main Content (Right).
5. For the API integration, create a service file 'src/services/api.js' to handle the 'api.star-citizen.wiki' calls.
6. Use the provided background images for the Landing/Login page.
7. Mock the OAuth flow if actual keys are missing, but structure the code to accept a token.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
